content.hint: Think about what helps teams stay aligned when they can’t see each other in person.
content.situation: Two colleagues are discussing how remote work has changed the most important skills for team collaboration.
content.speakerText: You know, it’s not just about getting tasks done—what really makes a difference is ___.
content.speakerTextCn: 你知道吗，这不仅仅是完成任务的问题——真正起作用的是___。
content.knowledgePoint: 核心能力表达：远程协作中的关键技能
content.responseTemplate: You know, it’s not just about getting tasks done—what really makes a difference is ___.

content.hint: What internal quality helps you keep going when no one is checking on your progress?
content.situation: During a virtual team meeting, someone says that while tools are useful, the real challenge is staying motivated without direct supervision.
content.speakerText: Tools help, but without someone watching over you, ___ becomes critical.
content.speakerTextCn: 工具有帮助，但如果没有人在旁边监督，___就变得至关重要。
content.knowledgePoint: 核心能力表达：自主驱动与内在动力
content.responseTemplate: Tools help, but without someone watching over you, ___ becomes critical.

content.hint: This is about understanding others’ feelings and responding appropriately—even through a screen.
content.situation: A manager is explaining to new remote hires why soft skills matter more than technical skills in virtual environments.
content.speakerText: Technical skills get you in the door, but long-term success depends on ___ and adaptability.
content.speakerTextCn: 技术技能能让你入门，但长期成功取决于___和适应能力。
content.knowledgePoint: 核心能力表达：情绪智力在远程环境中的重要性
content.responseTemplate: Technical skills get you in the door, but long-term success depends on ___ and adaptability.

content.hint: 强调远程工作缺乏监督的场景
content.template: I’d argue self-discipline is the real key—no one’s watching you ___.
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（no one’s watching you at home）

content.hint: 在没有面对面交流时，主要依赖哪种沟通形式？
content.template: Remote work demands strong ___ communication skills because you can’t rely on tone or body language.

content.hint: 与‘emotional’搭配的高频职场术语，指理解他人情绪的能力
content.template: To succeed remotely, you need to master digital tools and develop emotional ___ to understand colleagues’ feelings.
